page.content: In Table 1, the categories of lesions include "Pigs with esophageal ulcers," which total 468 with 112 in the <40 kg category, 160 in the 40-60 kg category, and 196 in the >60 kg category; "Pigs without esophageal ulcers," totaling 4572 with 2021 in the <40 kg category, 1440 in the 40-60 kg category, and 1111 in the >60 kg category; and the category totals, which sum to 5040 with 2133 in the <40 kg category, 1600 in the 40-60 kg category, and 1307 in the >60 kg category.
